title: LuckyBlock
description: Lucky blocks with configurable drops and permissions
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The LuckyBlock plugin allows players with the appropriate permissions to designate specific blocks as lucky blocks. These blocks, when interacted with, provide players with a customizable and random drop based on predefined probabilities. The plugin ensures these blocks are indestructible and their positions are saved and loaded from a configuration file, making them persistent across server restarts. [Here's a detailed breakdown of the functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/1)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
